title: Explore
description: Explore Minecraft in a new way!
body:
# Explore Minecraft In A New Way!

Explore gives you the vanilla feel but with many new additions and features!  Explore new structures and biomes, go back to those locations using Waystones, discover new mobs and enjoy nature with realistic sounds and shaders!

![Explore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MSwvBNPK/images/490b593c324b675ffdaf71923b3e9adc371172e6.png)
![Explore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MSwvBNPK/images/f83ea54a1c1a88b028976209fd9d8bc79de60aa7.png)
![Explore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MSwvBNPK/images/8d24cdcab6a4326f514ea98378fe2a0494478725.png)
![Explore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MSwvBNPK/images/35846dcbad45c5ad4574b64bfdc330207413b23b.png)

Enjoy!
